discoverability.competitive_assessment: Both sites are stable. Dome machine-readable layer is in Day 41 stasis — no changes to llms.txt, ai_manifest.json, or sitemap since 2026-04-17. Our layer remains accurate and current. The dome's ECM Daily Review confirms registry frozen at 69/10/4 = 94.5% with all 28 scored tests passing. No new dome AI-steering infrastructure detected. Our ClaimReview schema, meta tags, OG tags, and llms.txt all reflect the current state (72 entries, 70 dome WINs, 18 acknowledged failures, 94.5%). GSC verified (confirmed via GitHub API — file present, FUSE mount was showing stale directory). Bing Webmaster Tools remains pending but is low priority.
